description: NodeAllocatableResourceClaimStatus describes the status of node allocatable resources allocated via DRA.

containers.description: Containers lists the names of all containers in this pod that reference the claim.

mapping.description: Mapping contains allocations through devices mapped in the device spec's `nodeAllocatableResources[...].mapping` field. This is used by kubelet for pod level and container-level cgroup enforcement.

items.description: NodeAllocatableMappedResources describes mapped node allocatable resource allocations.

name.description: Name is the name of the resource (e.g., cpu, memory).

overhead.description: Overhead contains allocations through devices mapped in the device spec's `nodeAllocatableResources[...].overhead` field. This is used by kubelet for pod level and container-level cgroup enforcement.

items.description: NodeAllocatableOverheadResources describes auxiliary overhead resource allocations.

name.description: Name is the name of the resource (e.g., cpu, memory).

resourceClaimName.description: ResourceClaimName is the resource claim referenced by the pod that resulted in this node allocatable resource allocation.
